title: OPRT OPORTUN FINANCIAL CORPORATION Sees Q2 Revenue Range $245M - $250M
text: Oportun Financial Corporation provided guidance for Q2 2023 revenue in the range of $245 million to $250 million. The company subsequently reported Q2 2023 revenue results that beat expectations. Oportun Financial Corporation came out with quarterly earnings of $0.06 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.21 per share. This compared to earnings of $0.11 per share a year ago. The company posted revenues of approximately $266.6 million for the quarter ended June 2023, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by approximately 6.10%.
